# ReplySuite

> ReplySuite is an AI-powered live chat and automation platform. Build trainable chatbots for Instagram, WhatsApp, and your website — without coding.

## What ReplySuite Does

ReplySuite lets businesses create AI chatbots trained on their own data (documents, URLs, text) and deploy them across multiple channels: website chat widgets, Instagram DMs, and WhatsApp — all from one dashboard.

## Pricing (as of 2025)

- **Free** — $0/month: 1 chatbot, 100 conversations/month, trainable AI agent, email support
- **Silver** — $17.88/month: 3 chatbots, 2,500 conversations/month, advanced bot training, priority support
- **Gold** — $26.88/month: Unlimited chatbots, unlimited conversations, proprietary bot training, dedicated account manager
- **Enterprise** — Custom pricing: Contact support@replysuite.app

All paid plans include a 30-day free trial.

## Key Features

- Trainable AI agents — upload PDFs, URLs, or plain text to teach the bot your brand voice
- Instagram Auto-DM — automatically reply to comments with personalized DMs
- WhatsApp automation — handle inbound WhatsApp messages with AI
- Website chat widget — embed on any site with a single `<script>` tag
- Multi-language support — Kinyarwanda, English, French, Swahili, and more
- Real-time analytics — track conversations, success rates, and top triggers

## Trust Infrastructure

ReplySuite is built on a foundation of data privacy and ethical AI usage.
- **Data Sovereignty**: Customer data is logically isolated and never used for training global models.
- **Security**: AES-256 encryption at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit, and DDoS protection via Cloudflare.
- **Transparency**: Clear labeling for AI-generated content is recommended for all users.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Can I cancel my subscription any time?**
Yes, cancel anytime from account settings. Access continues until the end of your billing cycle.

**Is there a free trial?**
Yes. All new verified accounts get an automatic 30-day free month — no credit card required for the Free plan.

**What happens if I exceed my monthly conversation limit?**
You will be notified at 80% and 100% usage. You can upgrade at any time to avoid interruption.

**What channels does ReplySuite support?**
Website chat widgets, Instagram Direct Messages (via Meta API), and WhatsApp Business.
